reason: All 9 renderChainDiagram unit tests pass. All 50 test files (922 tests) pass. Fixed CLI --help regression (program.description override). CLI diagram subcommand renders ASCII art. TUI modal, command palette, and overlay stack wired. Cycles, missing tasks, silent markers, steps/commands all verified.
prMarkdown:
## Evidence ✅ passed
> All acceptance criteria verified: diagram command in loops palette with taskId guard, DiagramModal with scroll/copy/escape, CLI `diagram <loop-id>` subcommand, cycle detection, missing task handling, silent chain markers. Fixed cli.ts program.description override causing `--help` test failure. Full test suite green (50/50 files, 922 pass).
